Title: xCart - Get or Create Cart via Query
Preconditions: User authenticated with valid token; store configured; GraphiQL UI accessible at {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password&scope=offline_access&username={{USER_EMAIL}}&password={{USER_PASSWORD}}&storeId={{STORE_ID}} → save bearer token
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click "Headers" button (right tab in bottom panel — NOT "Variables" which is the left/default tab) → set auth token in Headers editor using execCommand('insertText') on the Headers textarea (see graphiql-interaction.md § Setting Auth Token) → take screenshot to verify token is visible in Headers panel
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type query: query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { id name itemsCount items { id productId quantity } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — save cart id
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[DATA] data.cart object returned (auto-created if none existed)
[DATA] data.cart.id is non-empty string
[DATA] Cart id matches UUID format
[ERRORS] No errors[] in response
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type same cart query → execute → same cart returned
[ADMIN] Cart appears in Admin order management
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; data.cart null; cart id empty; subsequent cart query returns different cart; GraphiQL shows auth error (missing/invalid token)

Title: xCart - Add Item to Cart Mutation
Preconditions: Cart created from GQL-005; product ID known; auth header set in GraphiQL
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[SETUP] Get userId: query { me { id } } → save as <USER_ID>
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" productId: "{{TEST_SKU}}" quantity: 2 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount items { id productId quantity listPrice { amount } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify item added
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] itemsCount = 1 (or incremented by 1 if cart had items)
[DATA] items[] contains entry with productId = {{TEST_SKU}}
[DATA] items[0].quantity = 2
[MATH] items[0].listPrice.amount > 0
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query → execute → item present
[ADMIN] Line item visible in Admin cart view
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; itemsCount not incremented; quantity wrong; listPrice.amount = 0 or null; productId mismatch
Cleanup: remove item from cart via removeCartItem mutation in GraphiQL

Title: xCart - Update Cart Item Quantity
Preconditions: Cart with items from GQL-006; lineItemId known; auth header set in GraphiQL
Test_Data: cartId from GQL-005; lineItemId from GQL-006; newQuantity=5
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { changeCartItemQuantity(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" lineItemId: "<LINE_ITEM_ID>" quantity: 5 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id items { id quantity } subTotal { amount } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify quantity and totals
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] items[0].quantity = 5
[MATH] subTotal.amount = items[0].listPrice.amount × 5 (within rounding tolerance)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query → execute → quantity = 5
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; quantity still 2; subtotal not recalculated; GraphiQL shows auth error

Title: xCart - Remove Item from Cart
Preconditions: Cart with items; lineItemId known; auth header set in GraphiQL
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { removeCartItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" lineItemId: "<LINE_ITEM_ID>" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount items { id } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify item removed
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] itemsCount decremented by 1
[DATA] Removed item id no longer in items[]
[DATA] Cart remains valid (id still present)
[MATH] Totals recalculated (subTotal lower if items remain)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query → execute → item absent
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; itemsCount unchanged; removed item still in items[]; cart becomes null after removal

Title: xCart - Set Shipping Address
Preconditions: Cart with items; valid address available; auth header set in GraphiQL
Test_Data: cartId; address: city="@td(ADDR_NY.city)" state="@td(ADDR_NY.state)" zip="@td(ADDR_NY.zip)" country="US"
Steps:
[SETUP] Get userId: query { me { id } } → save as <USER_ID>
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { addOrUpdateCartShipment(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" shipment: { deliveryAddress: { city: "New York" countryCode: "US" countryName: "United States" firstName: "Test" lastName: "User" line1: "123 Test St" postalCode: "10001" regionId: "NY" regionName: "New York" } } }) { id shipments { deliveryAddress { city countryCode line1 postalCode regionName } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify address saved
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type cart query to confirm shipping info
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify address fields on shipment
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] Shipping address saved on cart shipment
[DATA] City, state, zip, country populated and match input
[DATA] No validation errors for valid address
[DATA] Cart ready for shipping method selection (availableShippingMethods non-empty)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Cart query confirms shipment with address fields populated
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; address fields null after mutation; validationErrors on shipment; availableShippingMethods empty after address set

Title: xCart - Apply Coupon Mutation
Preconditions: Cart with items; valid coupon code "TESTCOUPON" configured; auth header set in GraphiQL
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { addCoupon(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" couponCode: "TESTCOUPON" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } discountTotal { amount } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify coupon applied
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation with invalid coupon: mutation { addCoupon(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" couponCode: "BADCODE999" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id coupons { code isAppliedSuccessfully } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify appropriate error
Assertions:
[RESPONSE] Response panel shows data without error banner
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] coupons[] contains entry with code="TESTCOUPON"
[DATA] isAppliedSuccessfully = true
[MATH] discountTotal.amount > 0
[DATA] Invalid coupon returns structured error or isAppliedSuccessfully = false (not a 500)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query → execute → coupon still applied
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty on valid coupon; isAppliedSuccessfully = false for valid code; discountTotal = 0 after successful apply; GraphiQL shows error banner on invalid coupon
Cleanup: remove coupon from cart via removeCoupon mutation in GraphiQL; delete cart

Title: xCart - Full Checkout Flow via GraphQL
Preconditions: User authenticated; products available with known SKU; payment and shipping configured; GraphiQL UI loaded with auth header set
Steps:
[SETUP] Get userId: query { me { id } } → save as <USER_ID>
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type cart query: query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { id } } → Execute → Read response → save cartId
[ACT] Clear editor → type addItem mutation: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" productId: "{{TEST_SKU}}" quantity: 1 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } } → Execute → Read response → verify itemsCount=1; save cart id as <CART_ID>
[ACT] Clear editor → type addOrUpdateCartShipment with address and method (MUST include price matching rate — see order-creation-matrix.md § GraphQL xAPI Checkout Flow): mutation { addOrUpdateCartShipment(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" shipment: { shipmentMethodCode: "FixedRate" shipmentMethodOption: "Ground" price: 150 deliveryAddress: { city: "New York" countryCode: "US" countryName: "United States" firstName: "Test" lastName: "User" line1: "123 Test St" postalCode: "10001" regionId: "NY" regionName: "New York" } } }) { id } } → Execute → Read response → verify address saved
[ACT] Clear editor → type addOrUpdateCartPayment: mutation { addOrUpdateCartPayment(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" payment: { paymentGatewayCode: "DefaultManualPaymentMethod" } }) { id } } → Execute → Read response
[ACT] Clear editor → type createOrderFromCart mutation: mutation { createOrderFromCart(command: { cartId: "<CART_ID>" }) { id number status } } → Execute → Read response → save orderId
[WAIT] Measure total elapsed time across all mutations
Assertions:
[ERRORS] Each mutation: errors[] present and empty (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] Cart totals update correctly after each addItem/address/shipping step
[MATH] Shipping rates > 0 in availableShippingMethods
[DATA] Order created with id, number, status = "New" or "Processing"
[DATA] End-to-end flow completes in < 30 seconds total
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type orders query → execute → new order appears
[ADMIN] Order visible in Admin
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL throughout flow
Failure_Signals: Any mutation returning errors[] non-empty in response panel; cart totals not updating; availableShippingMethods empty; order not created; total time > 30s
Cleanup: cancel/delete test order via Admin API

Title: xCart - Cart Uses Live Price After Admin Price Change (Not Cached Index)
Preconditions: Authenticated user; product with known price; Admin API accessible; GraphiQL UI loaded with auth header set
Test_Data: productId={{TEST_SKU}}; priceListId from Admin; originalPrice (recorded); newPrice (different from original)
Steps:
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type products query for {{TEST_SKU}} → Execute → Read response → record as originalPrice
[ACT] Change {{TEST_SKU}} price via: PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/pricing/pricelists/<priceListId>/prices with newPrice
[WAIT] Wait 2 seconds
[SETUP] Get userId: query { me { id } } → save as <USER_ID>
[ACT] Clear editor → type addItem mutation: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" productId: "{{TEST_SKU}}" quantity: 1 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } } → Execute → save cart id as <CART_ID>
[ACT] Clear editor → type cart query: query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" cartId: "<CART_ID>") { items { productId listPrice { amount } placedPrice { amount } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — compare placedPrice against newPrice
Assertions:
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty on addItem (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] cart items[0].placedPrice.amount = newPrice (not originalPrice)
[DATA] cart items[0].listPrice.amount = newPrice
[DATA] No mixed pricing: all monetary fields on line item use newPrice
[DATA] BL-GQL-003: Cart resolves live price, not stale index
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query again → execute → same prices
[ADMIN] Admin pricing UI reflects new price
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel; placedPrice = originalPrice (stale cache); mixed pricing on line item; REST price update returns non-200
Cleanup: restore original price via PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/pricing/pricelists/<priceListId>/prices; delete test cart

Title: xCart - Price Update Reflected on Re-query After Admin Change
Preconditions: Cart with existing item at known price; Admin API accessible; GraphiQL UI loaded with auth header set
Steps:
[SETUP] Get userId: query { me { id } } → save as <USER_ID>
[ACT] Clear editor → type cart query: query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { id } } → Execute → save cartId
[ACT] Clear editor → type addItem mutation: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" productId: "{{TEST_SKU}}" quantity: 1 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } } → Execute → save cart id as <CART_ID>
[ACT] Clear editor → type cart query → Execute → Read response → record items[0].placedPrice.amount as originalPlacedPrice
[ACT] Change {{TEST_SKU}} price via: PUT {{BACK_URL}}/api/pricing/pricelists/<priceListId>/prices with newPrice
[ACT] Clear editor → type same cart query: query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" cartId: "<CART_ID>") { items { productId placedPrice { amount } listPrice { amount } } subTotal { amount } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — compare placedPrice before and after price change
Assertions:
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty on mutations (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] items[0].placedPrice.amount = newPrice (not originalPlacedPrice)
[MATH] subTotal.amount recalculated = newPrice × quantity
[DATA] No stale/cached price persisted in cart
[DATA] BL-GQL-003 + BL-CROSS-002: Cart uses live price regardless of index state
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Re-execute cart query → prices consistent
[ADMIN] Admin cart view reflects new price on line item
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: items[0].placedPrice = originalPlacedPrice (P0 violation: stale cached price); subtotal not recalculated; errors[] non-empty on re-query

Title: xCart - Cart Invalidated After Order Creation (No Reuse)
Preconditions: User authenticated; cart fully configured and converted to order via createOrderFromCart; orderId and cartId both known; auth header set in GraphiQL
Test_Data: storeId={{STORE_ID}}; cartId=<converted cart UUID>; orderId=<created order UUID>; productId={{TEST_SKU}}; user_email={{USER_EMAIL}}; user_password={{USER_PASSWORD}}
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{BACK_URL}}/connect/token grant_type=password&scope=offline_access&username={{USER_EMAIL}}&password={{USER_PASSWORD}}&storeId={{STORE_ID}} → save bearer token
[NAV] {{BACK_URL}}/ui/graphiql
[WAIT] GraphiQL editor loaded
[ACT] Click "Headers" button (right tab in bottom panel — NOT "Variables" which is the left/default tab) → set auth token in Headers editor using execCommand('insertText') on the Headers textarea (see graphiql-interaction.md § Setting Auth Token) → take screenshot to verify token is visible in Headers panel
[SETUP] Get userId: query { me { id } } → save as <USER_ID>
[SETUP] Add item (see order-creation-matrix.md § GraphQL xAPI Checkout Flow): mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" productId: "{{TEST_SKU}}" quantity: 1 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } } → save cart id as <CART_ID>
[SETUP] Set shipment (MUST include price matching rate — see order-creation-matrix.md): mutation { addOrUpdateCartShipment(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" shipment: { shipmentMethodCode: "FixedRate" shipmentMethodOption: "Ground" price: 150 deliveryAddress: { city: "New York" countryCode: "US" countryName: "United States" firstName: "Test" lastName: "User" line1: "123 Test St" postalCode: "10001" regionId: "NY" regionName: "New York" } } }) { id } }
[SETUP] Set payment: mutation { addOrUpdateCartPayment(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" payment: { paymentGatewayCode: "DefaultManualPaymentMethod" } }) { id } }
[ACT] Click query editor → clear (Ctrl+A, Backspace)
[ACT] Type mutation: mutation { createOrderFromCart(command: { cartId: "<CART_ID>" }) { id number status } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result (up to 10s)
[READ] Read response — record orderId; verify errors[] empty
[VAR] orderId = data.createOrderFromCart.id
[ACT] Clear editor → type cart query to check cart state: query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" cartId: "<CART_ID>" currencyCode: "USD") { id status itemsCount } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — record cart state (null or inactive status)
[ACT] Clear editor → type addItem mutation targeting the converted cart: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" productId: "{{TEST_SKU}}" quantity: 1 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify addItem response (should error or return null cart)
[ACT] Clear editor → type changeCartItemQuantity on converted cart: mutation { changeCartItemQuantity(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" lineItemId: "any-id" quantity: 5 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[WAIT] Response panel shows result
[READ] Read response — verify mutation fails gracefully
Assertions:
[DATA] createOrderFromCart: errors[] empty; valid non-empty orderId returned (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] Cart query after order: data.cart is null OR cart.status indicates inactive/completed (not "Active")
[DATA] addItem on converted cart: returns errors[] with message referencing cart not found or cart already converted — NOT silent success (P0 guard: BL-CROSS-010)
[DATA] addItem on converted cart: does NOT increment any order's itemsCount
[DATA] changeCartItemQuantity on converted cart: returns error, not success
[ERRORS] Both post-order mutations: errors[] contains message, NOT a stack trace or null pointer exception
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type order query: query { order(id: "<ORDER_ID>") { id items { id } } } → execute → items[] count unchanged (no new items added via invalidated cart)
[ADMIN] Cart not modifiable in Admin after order creation; order items unchanged
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: Silent success on addItem to converted cart (P0 violation: duplicate inventory decrement risk); cart query still shows active status; changeCartItemQuantity succeeds on converted cart; unhandled exception in mutation response
Cleanup: cancel/delete test order via Admin API {{BACK_URL}}/api/order/customerOrders/<ORDER_ID>

Title: xCart - Currency Switch Updates All Line Items to New Price List
Preconditions: Products with prices in both USD and EUR price lists; auth header set in GraphiQL
Test_Data: cartId; productA_id (has USD+EUR prices); productB_id (has USD+EUR prices)
Steps:
[SETUP] Get userId: query { me { id } } → save as <USER_ID>
[ACT] Clear editor → type cart query: query { cart(storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US") { id } } → Execute → save cartId
[ACT] Clear editor → type addItem for productA: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" productId: "<PRODUCT_A>" quantity: 1 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } } → Execute → save cart id as <CART_ID>
[ACT] Clear editor → type addItem for productB: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" productId: "<PRODUCT_B>" quantity: 1 currencyCode: "USD" cultureName: "en-US" }) { id itemsCount } } → Execute
[ERRORS] Verify errors[] empty on each mutation
[ACT] Clear editor → type cart query → Execute → Read response → record USD prices
[ACT] Clear editor → type mutation: mutation { changeCartCurrency(command: { storeId: "{{STORE_ID}}" userId: "<USER_ID>" cartId: "<CART_ID>" newCurrencyCode: "EUR" }) { id currency { code } items { productId listPrice { amount currency { code } } placedPrice { amount currency { code } } } subTotal { amount currency { code } } } }
[GQL] Click Execute (▶) or Ctrl+Enter
[READ] Read response — verify ALL monetary fields use EUR
Assertions:
[ERRORS] errors[] present and empty on changeCartCurrency (BL-GQL-001)
[DATA] All items[].listPrice.currency.code = "EUR"
[DATA] All items[].placedPrice.currency.code = "EUR"
[DATA] subTotal.currency.code = "EUR"
[DATA] Price amounts correspond to EUR price list values (NOT USD-to-EUR conversion rates)
[DATA] Zero fields showing USD after currency switch (atomic update — BL-CROSS-004)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[ROUNDTRIP] Clear editor → type cart query → execute → all EUR confirmed
[CONSOLE] No JS errors in GraphiQL
Failure_Signals: errors[] non-empty in response panel on currency switch; any item still showing currencyCode="USD"; price appears to be USD amount with EUR label; subTotal in wrong currency
